title: Senior Teacher - SSC Tube - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - SSC Tube - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
